# authentik_stage_prompt_field (Data Source)

Get stage prompt fields by id or name

## Example Usage

```terraform
# To get the ID of a prompt field by name

data "authentik_stage_prompt_field" "default_user_settings_field_email" {
  name = "default-user-settings-field-email"
}

# Then use `data.authentik_stage_prompt_field.default_user_settings_field_email.id`
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Generated.
- `name` (String) Generated.

### Read-Only

- `field_key` (String) Generated.
- `initial_value` (String) Generated.
- `initial_value_expression` (Boolean) Generated.
- `label` (String) Generated.
- `order` (Number) Generated.
- `placeholder` (String) Generated.
- `placeholder_expression` (Boolean) Generated.
- `required` (Boolean) Generated.
- `sub_text` (String) Generated.
- `type` (String) Generated.
